system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_phieuxuat_getbymonth","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_PHIEUXUAT_GETBYMONTH]
(
	@USERNAME NVARCHAR(50),
	@YEAR INT,
	@MONTH INT
)
AS
SELECT @USERNAME AS username, @YEAR as nam, @MONTH as thang
	, A.makho, B.mact, C.mota, C.mausac, C.quycach, C.dvt
	, SUM(B.soluong) AS soluong_xuat
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 1 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D1
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 2 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D2
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 3 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D3
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 4 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D4
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 5 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D5
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 6 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D6
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 7 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D7
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 8 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D8
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 9 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D9
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 10 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D10
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 11 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D11
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 12 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D12
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 13 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D13
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 14 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D14
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 15 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D15
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 16 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D16
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 17 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D17
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 18 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D18
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 19 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D19
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 20 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D20
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 21 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D21
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 22 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D22
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 23 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D23
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 24 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D24
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 25 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D25
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 26 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D26
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 27 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D27
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 28 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D28
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 29 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D29
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 30 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D30
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(A.ngaytao) = 31 THEN (B.soluong) ELSE 0 END) AS D31
FROM tr_phieuxuat A
	INNER JOIN tr_ctphieuxuat B ON A.sopx = B.phieuxuat
	INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.mact = C.mavt
WHERE A.active = 1
	AND YEAR(A.ngaytao) = @YEAR
	AND MONTH(A.ngaytao) = @MONTH
GROUP BY A.makho, B.mact, C.mota, C.mausac, C.quycach, C.dvt



","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_phieuxuat"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
